title: Zovark — API Health
description: Ticket 7 — HTTP request rate, duration, ingest and dedup counters (OTel metrics on zovark-api).

panels.title: HTTP span p95 by route (otelgin)
panels.query: SELECT httpRoute, quantile(0.95)(durationNano)/1e9 AS p95_s FROM signoz_index_v2 WHERE timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR AND kind = 2 GROUP BY httpRoute ORDER BY p95_s DESC LIMIT 30

panels.title: HTTP 5xx rate
panels.query: SELECT countIf(httpStatusCode >= 500) / count() AS ratio FROM signoz_index_v2 WHERE timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR AND kind = 2

panels.title: Ingest spans (ingest.*)
panels.query: SELECT name, count() FROM signoz_index_v2 WHERE timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR AND name LIKE 'ingest.%' GROUP BY name
